data.current_summary: Get the details of a specified marketing email.
data.current_description: Get the details for a marketing email.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete details of a specified marketing email by ID. Returns a PublicEmail object containing email metadata, content, recipient information, testing details (if A/B test), and subscription settings. Use this operation to view email configuration, content, and associated data before sending or making updates.
data.reasoning: The summary is clear and action-oriented. However, the description is too generic and lacks specificity about what data is returned. Added details about the response schema (PublicEmail), specific fields returned, and use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

The summary is adequate, but the description is completely missing. data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a marketing email by ID. This operation removes the email from the system and cannot be undone. The email must not be currently scheduled or in-flight. After deletion, the email ID will no longer be accessible. Use this operation to remove unwanted or obsolete marketing emails.
data.reasoning: The summary is adequate, but the description is completely missing. Added critical context about permanence, constraints (not scheduled/in-flight), side effects (email becomes inaccessible), and use cases to help AI agents understand the implications of this destructive operation.

data.current_description: Change properties of a marketing email.
data.description_suggestion: Updates specified properties of a marketing email using the EmailUpdateRequest schema. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. data.current_description: Resets the draft back to a copy of the live object.
data.summary_suggestion: Reset email draft to live version
data.description_suggestion: Resets the draft version of a marketing email to match the currently published (live) version. Any unsaved changes in the draft are discarded and replaced with the live version. Returns the reset draft email object. This operation is useful when you want to abandon draft changes and start fresh from the published version.
